title: Implement and monitor environmentally sustainable work practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement and monitor environmentally sustainable work practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Investigate current practices in relation to resource usage

pcs.text: Identify current environmental regulations applicable to the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify current environmental regulations applicable to the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify current environmental regulations applicable to the workplace.

pcs.text: Analyse procedures for assessing compliance with environmental and sustainability regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse procedures for assessing compliance with environmental and sustainability regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse procedures for assessing compliance with environmental and sustainability regulations.

pcs.text: Collect information on environmental and resource efficiency systems and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect information on environmental and resource efficiency systems and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect information on environmental and resource efficiency systems and procedures.

pcs.text: Analyse current resource usage and practices to identify areas for improvement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse current resource usage and practices to identify areas for improvement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse current resource usage and practices to identify areas for improvement.

pcs.text: Conduct an environmental hazard analysis and risk assessment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct an environmental hazard analysis and risk assessment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct an environmental hazard analysis and risk assessment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Investigate current practices in relation to resource usage

elements.title: Set targets for improvements

pcs.text: Seek input from stakeholders, key personnel and specialists

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine alternative solutions to workplace environmental issues.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set efficiency targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set efficiency targets.

elements.title: Implement performance improvement strategies

pcs.text: Source and use appropriate techniques and tools to assist in achieving efficiency targets

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and use appropriate techniques and tools to assist in achieving efficiency targets.

pcs.text: Implement and integrate work group environmental and resource efficiency improvement plans with other operational activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement and integrate work group environmental and resource efficiency improvement plans with other operational activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement and integrate work group environmental and resource efficiency improvement plans with other operational activities.

pcs.text: Supervise and support team members to identify possible areas for improved practices and resource efficiency in work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise and support team members to identify possible areas for improved practices and resource efficiency in work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise and support team members to identify possible areas for improved practices and resource efficiency in work area.

pcs.text: Seek suggestions and ideas about environmental and resource efficiency management from stakeholders, and act upon them where appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek suggestions and ideas about environmental and resource efficiency management from stakeholders, and act upon them where appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek suggestions and ideas about environmental and resource efficiency management from stakeholders, and act upon them where appropriate.

pcs.text: Implement costing strategies to fully value environmental assets

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement costing strategies to fully value environmental assets.
